members.name: AddPeer
members.signature: public int AddPeer(WebRTCPeerConnection peer, int peerId, int unreliableLifetime)
members.summary: Add a new peer to the mesh with the given [param peer_id]. The [WebRTCPeerConnection] must be in state [constant WebRTCPeerConnection.STATE_NEW]. Three channels will be created for reliable, unreliable, and ordered transport. The value of [param unreliable_lifetime] will be passed to the [code]"maxPacketLifetime"[/code] option when creating unreliable and ordered channels (see [method WebRTCPeerConnection.create_data_channel]).

members.name: CreateClient
members.signature: public int CreateClient(int peerId, Array channelsConfig)
members.summary: Initialize the multiplayer peer as a client with the given [param peer_id] (must be between 2 and 2147483647). In this mode, you should only call [method add_peer] once and with [param peer_id] of [code]1[/code]. This mode enables [method MultiplayerPeer.is_server_relay_supported], allowing the upper [MultiplayerAPI] layer to perform peer exchange and packet relaying. You can optionally specify a [param channels_config] array of [enum MultiplayerPeer.TransferMode] which will be used to create extra channels (WebRTC only supports one transfer mode per channel).

members.name: CreateMesh
members.signature: public int CreateMesh(int peerId, Array channelsConfig)
members.summary: Initialize the multiplayer peer as a mesh (i.e. all peers connect to each other) with the given [param peer_id] (must be between 1 and 2147483647).

members.name: CreateServer
members.summary: Initialize the multiplayer peer as a server (with unique ID of [code]1[/code]). This mode enables [method MultiplayerPeer.is_server_relay_supported], allowing the upper [MultiplayerAPI] layer to perform peer exchange and packet relaying. You can optionally specify a [param channels_config] array of [enum MultiplayerPeer.TransferMode] which will be used to create extra channels (WebRTC only supports one transfer mode per channel).

members.name: GetPeer
members.summary: Returns a dictionary representation of the peer with given [param peer_id] with three keys. [code]"connection"[/code] containing the [WebRTCPeerConnection] to this peer, [code]"channels"[/code] an array of three [WebRTCDataChannel], and [code]"connected"[/code] a boolean representing if the peer connection is currently connected (all three channels are open).

members.name: GetPeers
members.summary: Returns a dictionary which keys are the peer ids and values the peer representation as in [method get_peer].

members.name: HasPeer
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given [param peer_id] is in the peers map (it might not be connected though).

members.name: RemovePeer
members.summary: Remove the peer with given [param peer_id] from the mesh. If the peer was connected, and [signal MultiplayerPeer.peer_connected] was emitted for it, then [signal MultiplayerPeer.peer_disconnected] will be emitted.
